title: chore: consolidate stale app submission PRs
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Collapses five stale, conflicting `apps/APPS.md` bot PRs into one clean, mergeable change.

- Add **RoleChar** (chat) — approved (#10492), site live (200)
- Add **SpiritPet World** (games) — approved (#10588), site live (200)
- Remove **Athelte Studio** — site returns 404 (dead)
- Regenerate `GREENHOUSE.md` + `README.md` via `app-update-greenhouse.js`

Supersedes #11521, #11533, #11941, #11804, #11287 — all conflicting, duplicated, or already applied on main.

Fixes #10492
Fixes #10588

gist.headline: Fresh sprouts in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: We've tidied up the community showcase and welcomed two new apps to the greenhouse: RoleChar and SpiritPet World!
gist.summary: Consolidated several stale app submission PRs to add RoleChar and SpiritPet World to the community showcase while removing a dead link.
gist.impact: Users can now discover RoleChar and SpiritPet World in the community apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot tending to a greenhouse or garden, planting two new seeds/sprouts (representing the two new apps), while sweeping away a dead leaf (the dead link).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering two glowing new code-plants in a lime green (#ecf874) greenhouse. A chunky pixel robot companion happily holds a sign saying 'NEW APPS'. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
